text: Ship-log skill + GitHub profile auto-sync — say "what did I ship this week" and Copilot drafts your build log entries, commits them, and updates the profile README automatically.
Portfolio polish — real avatar, Clarity analytics, dynamic footer year, new blog post on local AI with WhisperKit + MLX.
Code review + cleanup pass on mingz.dev — updated About bio, fixed preview script, added featured projects, freshened build log.
Worker-center v2 — modular architecture with Ming HQ orchestrator, 5 marketplace scrapers running every 15 min.
JobClaw hit 200+ daily postings across 20 sources. Added LLM scoring and auto-apply pipeline.
MeetMate — Swift app for live meeting transcription with on-device Whisper + MLX summarization.
Added About page to the portfolio. Casual bio, MZ placeholder avatar, "currently building" section with linked project cards.
Published pr-reviewer-daemon as a project on mingz.dev. Ran a security audit first — caught org references in config files, stripped repoUrl.
Rebuilt the entire portfolio from React SPA to Astro. Static HTML, content collections, Tailwind dark mode. 100/100 Lighthouse.
Neuro-Ming milestone 1 — chatbot with personality module, FastAPI web UI, conversation memory, text-to-speech. Pushed to GitHub.
Built an MCP server that reads Microsoft Teams chat via Graph API. MSAL token refresh was the tricky part.
Set up GPON ONT bypass at Selma property — WAS-110 XGS-PON stick replacing the Telus ONT. 10G symmetric on UniFi.
Deployed VamAi workshop materials — Jupyter notebooks covering computer vision, NLP, and model training.
